name: introduce-public-alpha-install-path
description: Introduce public alpha install path 的决策记录。
---

# introduce-public-alpha-install-path

## Candidate

Introduce public alpha install path

Add the minimum installation path required for external users.

## Category

change

## Proposed By

agent

## Context

Add the minimum installation path required for external users.

## Impact Of No Action

External users cannot try OpenDaaS repeatably.

## Expected Outcome

A real external trial path becomes possible.

## Boundary

Only the alpha installation path; no hosted control plane.

## Decision

**批准**

## Decision Summary

公开 alpha 的安装路径已经成为发布基线中的必要条件，当前风险可控且收益明确。

## Revisit Condition

若后续发现安装形态需要脱离 CLI-first 假设，则重新审查该候选行动。
